3004800.name: Syco Realm VR
3004800.description: Update 1.3 VR RPG Survival Adventure. Design and Build your own Base in any layout you desire In Your Base Realm, Travel through Gates from your Base Realm to New Realms, small outpost build area in each Realm. Craft Weapons and Armor needed to explore through 5 Open World Realms, Visit Realms to Find and Activate 4 Gate Switches and Destroy the Realm's Witch, open the Realm's Gate to Travel to the next Realm. Use Upgraded Weapons and Armor to Survive Battles with the Witch's Soldiers and Wolves and Unlock the next Realm. New Realms unlock next Tier of Ingots for Crafting even more stronger Weapons and Armor. Complete Realm's to Unlock new Building Materials Wood, Brick, Metal. This is a true Indie Game made by a Solo Developer. (If Headset or controllers don't work check Oculus is set as the PC's default OpenXR Runtime.)
3004800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
